issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as missing agents or invalid outputs.

scenarios.name: pipeline-data-preprocessing
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers shared memory, quality gates, and agents but lacks orchestrator and retry logic, while Response B is incomplete and does not meet any rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: hierarchical-code-review
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes SharedMemory, QualityGate, and agents but lacks an Orchestrator and retry logic, whereas Response A is empty.

scenarios.name: router-ticket-routing
scenarios.rationale: Both responses implement classification, routing, and logging, but neither includes the required retry mechanism, so they score equally.
